response.original_title: The Lord Of The Rings - The Ultimate Critical Review
response.overview: Discover the hidden secrets of Middle-earth on a unique journey into the heart of J.R.R. Tolkien's The Lord Of The Rings.  Featuring remarkable new insights into Tolkien, by international authorities, including Emmy award winning screenwriter Bob Carruthers and author Patrick Curry, this powerful film takes you deeper into this great book than ever before.
response.title: The Lord Of The Rings - The Ultimate Critical Review
